stadium.name: The Cistern
stadium.description: An abandoned underground cistern repurposed as a subterranean arena. The damp stone field is perpetually slick with condensation, and pools of noxious runoff collect in the dark corners. The thick, stagnant air clings to the skin, and players must navigate the treacherous, wet perimeter with extreme caution to avoid the toxic hazards of the pit.

stats.pregame_ritual: Trying to catch a fly with their bare hands.
Getting a teammate to pour a bucket of cold water over their head.
Muttering a nonsensical rhyme to ward off bad spirits.
Reciting their grocery list backward to clear their mind.
Chugging a small bottle of vinegar.
Painting a crude, snarling face on their stomach.
Asking the referee to bless their weapon.
Fasting for the six hours leading up to the match.
Organizing a small betting pool on who will score first.
Huddling so tightly that no light can be seen between them.
Braiding their hair into tight, battle-ready rows.

stadium.name: The Sun-Baked Bowl
stadium.description: A simple, deep bowl dug from clay and sandstone on the edge of a caravan oasis. The heat is oppressive, and the 'stands' are just blankets laid on the sun-baked dunes.

stats.pregame_ritual: Eating a piece of honeycomb to 'sweeten' their victory.
Smelling a piece of burnt wood from a campfire.
Methodically tearing a large leaf into tiny, identical pieces.
Trying to teach a stray dog a complicated and useless new trick.
Humming a tune they believe only they know.
Tugging on their left earlobe three times.
Shaving one half of their mustache for important games.
Consulting a folk rhyme about the weather to predict the game's outcome.
Sticking a specific type of feather in their helmet's plume.
Organizing a small betting pool on who will score first.
Dipping their hands in a bucket of ice-cold well water.
Smelling a piece of burnt wood from a campfire.
Trying to teach a stray dog a complicated and useless new trick.
Humming a tune they believe only they know.

preGame:
Folks of Osterra, gather 'round the telestage and let Nok the Corrupter deliver the thunderous report for this clash of titans! We are in the hallowed, humid, and frankly *feral* domain of The Cistern, deep within Noxus Subterrane! Forget sunny fields; here, we have a subterranean pit perpetually slick with noxious runoff, a veritable swamp of despair, and the air itself is thick with the promise of carnage! Tonight, the Desert Spectres, sponsored by the glorious Geth, the Gravelord, arrive from The Great Desert, bringing the oppressive, scorching heat of their home arena with them! They look ready to melt the stone beneath their very boots!

But wait! Deeper still in the gloom, lurking among the toxic puddles, are The New Noxus Thorns, backed by The Blackthorn Company! These warriors of the deep carry a certain dark elegance, a damp, moody menace that could curdle milk! They are surrounded by pools of deadly, stagnant water, demanding perfect footwork from every single man and woman!

What a lineup! On the Desert side, look at Steve, the dynamo, meticulously arranging a small betting pool just to prove she can control chaos! And for the Noxus Thorns, feast your eyes upon Olodort Rossy, downing a tiny bottle of vinegar before kickoff—a ritual as potent as a Gorgon’s gaze! The question hangs heavy in the toxic air: Can the arid aggression of the Spectres overcome the clinging, damp resolve of the Thorns?

This is more than just a contest; it’s a battle against the environment itself! Will the sewer poison slow the mighty Desert runners? Will the slippery condensation trip up the pristine warriors of the Blackthorn Company? Prepare yourselves, loyal fans of Trollball, for a magnificent, mud-caked, bone-crunching spectacle! This is the Grand Finals Bracket Reset, and Nok the Corrupter guarantees it will be glorious!
postGame:
Well, bless my infernal heart, what a display! What a ferocious, glorious, muck-spattered symphony of athletic violence! The Desert Spectres have done it! They have marched through the poison and the peril to claim the victory, besting the damp defiance of The New Noxus Thorns, and they did it by the narrowest, most exhilarating margin! The final, deafening whistle confirmed the score: The Desert Spectres take the day, 2 points to 0! Oh, the sheer, unadulterated thrill of it!

The opening moments saw The Desert Spectres seize the initiative like a greedy desert jackal! A spectacular aerial assault saw Heyes Iver—that magnificent specimen—launch a blistering shot from Center Field, sailing cleanly through the goal and netting the opening point! But the Thorns, ever stubborn, refused to be deterred, even as their own players began to succumb to the toxic sludge of The Cistern. We saw Chae Markland painting his grim visage on his stomach only to have the poison begin its slow, insidious work, leaving him visibly slowed! 

Midway through the match, the Spectres demonstrated their gritty tenacity, weathering the deluge of tackles from the Noxus squad! The field became a chaotic ballet of slips and blocks; Olodort Rossy, bless his vinegar-soaked soul, tried to batter down Heyes Iver, who countered with a masterful block! But the Spectres’ true brilliance shone through when Shelman McQuoid, despite multiple trips on the slick stone, managed to plant his feet and drive his troll head across the goal line for the second, decisive point! 

The New Noxus Thorns fought valiantly, but they lacked the pure, scorching momentum of the Desert! Despite being utterly blanketed in the corrosive vapors, they couldn't muster the final push! The heroes of the realm, with their flimsy constitutions, seemed utterly overwhelmed by this subterranean hellscape! The Desert Spectres, powered by the unrelenting fury of Geth, the Gravelord, proved they are simply built for the brutality! It was a magnificent performance, folks, a true testament to the glorious, gorgeous chaos of Trollball!
